pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code will not compile for Java 21 features if the compiler is configured for Java 8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not support compiling for Java 21 or the 'release' flag correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source/target configuration with the unified release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures API compatibility with the target JDK.

src/main/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance and modern API usage.
Add import for ThreadLocalRandom to support the new random number generation logic.
